# Dark Fantasy

> Dark Fantasy — premium adult intimate wellness, BDSM gear, and luxury bondage equipment. Free discreet shipping on orders $99+. 74 products, 17 collections.

Currency: USD. Storefront: https://bdsmpub.com

## About

Dark Fantasy curates body-safe, premium intimate wellness products including bondage gear, adult toys, sensation play kits, and couples' accessories. All items prioritize body-safe materials (silicone, real leather, medical-grade stainless steel).
